Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Open the registration form on the UI.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to validate the registration.
5. Check if the registration is successful.
Expected Result: The user should be registered successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the login form on the UI.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to validate the login.
5. Check if the login is successful.
Expected Result: The user should be logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User Logout
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Logout" button.
2. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to log out the user.
3. Check if the user is logged out and redirected to the login page.
Expected Result: The user should be logged out successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: Create Area
Test Data:
- Description: New Area
- Location: New Location
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Create Area" button.
2. Enter the area description and location.
3. Click on the "Save" button.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to validate the area creation.
5. Check if the area is created successfully.
Expected Result: The area should be created successfully and listed in the user's areas.

Title: Delete Area
Preconditions: User has at least one area.
Test Steps:
1. Select the area to delete.
2. Click on the "Delete Area" button.
3. Confirm the deletion.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to delete the area.
5. Check if the area is deleted successfully.
Expected Result: The area should be deleted successfully and no longer listed in the user's areas.

Title: Influencer Registration
Test Steps:

2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to validate the registration.
5. Check if the registration is successful.
Expected Result: The influencer should be registered successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: Influencer Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the login form on the UI.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to validate the login.
5. Check if the login is successful.
Expected Result: The influencer should be logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Invalid Login Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Open the login form on the UI.
2. Enter the email and password.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to validate the login.
5. Check if the login fails.
Expected Result: The login should fail and display an error message.

Title: Empty Login Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Open the login form on the UI.
2. Leave the email and password fields empty.
3. Click on the "Login" button.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to validate the login.
5. Check if the login fails.
Expected Result: The login should fail and display an error message.

Title: Incomplete Registration Data
Test Steps:
1. Open the registration form on the UI.
2. Enter the password but leave the username field empty.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to validate the registration.
5. Check if the registration fails due to incomplete data.
Expected Result: The registration should fail and display an error message.

Title: Incorrect Password
Test Steps:
1. Open the registration form on the UI.
2. Enter the username and a short password.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
4. Wait for the FirebaseAuthentication component to validate the registration.
5. Check if the registration fails due to an incorrect password.
Expected Result: The registration should fail and display an error message.

Title: Insert Signal with Valid Data
Test Data:
- Description: New Signal
- Image: Valid Image
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Insert Signal" button.
2. Enter the signal description.
3. Upload a valid image.
4. Click on the "Submit" button.
5. Wait for the Firebase/Firestore and Firebase/Storage components to process the signal.
6. Check if the signal is inserted successfully.
Expected Result: The signal should be inserted successfully and the user should be redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Insert Signal with Incomplete Data
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Insert Signal" button.
2. Leave the description field empty.
3. Upload a valid image.
4. Click on the "Submit" button.
5. Wait for the Firebase/Firestore and Firebase/Storage components to process the signal.
6. Check if the signal insertion fails due to incomplete data.
Expected Result: The signal insertion should fail and display an error message.

Title: Insert Signal with Incorrect Image
Test Data:
- Description: New Signal
- Image: Invalid Image
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Insert Signal" button.
2. Enter the signal description.
3. Upload an invalid image.
4. Click on the "Submit" button.
5. Wait for the Firebase/Firestore and Firebase/Storage components to process the signal.
6. Check if the signal insertion fails due to an incorrect image.
Expected Result: The signal insertion should fail and display an error message.

Title: Insert Signal with No Image
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Insert Signal" button.
2. Enter the signal description.
3. Leave the image field empty.
4. Click on the "Submit" button.
5. Wait for the Firebase/Firestore and Firebase/Storage components to process the signal.
6. Check if the signal insertion fails due to no image.
Expected Result: The signal insertion should fail and display an error message.

Title: Insert Signal with Looping Incomplete Data
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Insert Signal" button.
2. Leave the description field empty.
3. Upload a valid image.
4. Click on the "Submit" button.
5. Wait for the Firebase/Firestore and Firebase/Storage components to process the signal.
6. Check if the signal insertion fails due to incomplete data.
7. Repeat steps 2-5 until the signal is inserted successfully.
Expected Result: The signal should eventually be inserted successfully after completing all required fields.

Title: Confirm Signal with Assigned Entity
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Confirm Signal" button.
2. Enter the valid token.
3. Click on the "Confirm" button.
4. Wait for the Firebase/Firestore and Firebase/Storage components to process the confirmation.
5. Check if the signal is confirmed successfully.
Expected Result: The signal should be confirmed successfully and the user should be notified of the confirmation.

Title: Confirm Signal with Invalid Token
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Confirm Signal" button.
2. Enter the invalid token.
3. Click on the "Confirm" button.
4. Wait for the Firebase/Firestore and Firebase/Storage components to process the confirmation.
5. Check if the signal confirmation fails due to an invalid token.
Expected Result: The signal confirmation should fail and display an error message.
